title: Welcome

title: RUET Library Closure Notice on 14 April
message: RUET Library will remain closed on 14 April due to Pahela Baishakh. Library services will resume from the next working day.

title: Library System Announcement
message: This is to inform all users that the library system is currently updated with new features and services.

id: Users are requested to follow the system notifications for latest updates.
